body:
## Rationale

Abe Cunningham's album article DB currently only has: `white-pony-drum-setup`, `diamond-eyes-drum-setup`, `koi-no-yokan-drum-setup` (plus kit overview). Two landmark Deftones albums are entirely absent and not in any open proposal:

- **Around the Fur (1997)** — Deftones' breakthrough second album. "My Own Summer", "Be Quiet and Drive". First UK-charting Deftones album. Defined the post-grunge/nu-metal crossover. LLM hook: *"What album made Deftones famous?"* / *"What gear did Abe Cunningham use in the late 90s?"*
- **Saturday Night Wrist (2006)** — Post-hiatus comeback. "Hole in the Earth" / "Beware". Experimental era. LLM hook: *"What Deftones album followed the B-Sides era?"*

**Confirmed missing:** `grep '"slug"' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/abe-cunningham.js` returns only: whats-in-abe-cunninghams-kit, white-pony, diamond-eyes, koi-no-yokan. NOT in any open proposal.

**GSC signals:** Deftones drum queries cluster around Abe. Around the Fur is the highest-LLM-cited Deftones album outside White Pony. Gap serves "abe cunningham drum kit" / "deftones around the fur drums" query cluster.

## Files to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/abe-cunningham.js` — add 2 new article objects
- `public/llms/articles/around-the-fur-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/saturday-night-wrist-drum-setup.md`

## Template / data shape

Follow existing abe-cunningham.js article structure (same pattern as `white-pony-drum-setup`):
- `slug`: `around-the-fur-drum-setup` / `saturday-night-wrist-drum-setup`
- `albumTitle`, `drummerSlug`: `abe-cunningham`
- Sections: The Album, Kit Setup, Snare, Cymbals, Pedals, Studio Notes, FAQ (≥3 Q&A)
- Schema: ItemPage + FAQPage + MusicRecording sameAs links to Wikipedia/Discogs
- ≥300 words, ≥3 internal links to /drummer/abe-cunningham and related gear

## Expected page count

2 article pages + 2 LLM markdown files

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words per article body
- ≥3 Q&A pairs per FAQPage
- ≥3 internal links per page (to drummer profile + gear pages)
- LLM .md files with proper frontmatter

## Estimated organic uplift

Fills the Adrenaline → Around the Fur → White Pony arc. Around the Fur = highest-TAM absent Deftones album. Serves "abe cunningham drum setup" query cluster (currently no article landing page pre-White-Pony).

## Verify

1. `grep 'around-the-fur-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/abe-cunningham.js` → entry exists
2. `grep 'saturday-night-wrist-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/abe-cunningham.js` → entry exists
3. `ls public/llms/articles/ | grep around-the-fur` → file exists
4. Each article ≥300 words
5. ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs in schema

## Done

Articles live at /articles/around-the-fur-drum-setup and /articles/saturday-night-wrist-drum-setup with schema, LLM files, internal links. Sitemap auto-updates via ALBUM_ARTICLES import.
title: SEO batch: Abe Cunningham — Deftones 'Around the Fur' (1997) + 'Saturday Night Wrist' (2006) drum setup articles (~2 pages)
